fields.title: policy: clamp worker sandbox + approval to parent
fields.description:
## Task

Implement deterministic policy clamping so a worker can never be more permissive than its parent.

## Files

- Add `extensions/tau/src/task/sandbox-policy.ts` (or similar) for pure helpers.

## Rules (match codex-rs semantics)

- Filesystem: `read-only < workspace-write < danger-full-access` → worker = min(requested, parent)
- Network: `deny < allowlist < allow-all` → worker = min(requested, parent)
- Allowlist:
  - if parent is `allowlist`, worker allowlist must be subset (intersection)
  - if parent is `deny`, worker allowlist is empty
- Approval: `unless-trusted < never < on-request < on-failure` → worker = min(requested, parent)
- Timeout: worker timeout cannot exceed parent timeout

## DoD

- Pure functions with unit tests for edge cases.
- No behavior depends on UI availability.
fields.close_reason: Implemented worker sandbox/approval inheritance, clamping, per-call resnapshot, approval broker routing, and vitest coverage
